title: Quick Item Sorter
description: Adds an extremely lightweight inventory sorting system.
body:
# Quick Item Sorter
Quick Item Sorter adds a small Sort button to inventories and containers. One click sorts items and merges identical stacks. It does not override vanilla behavior. Compatibility with other inventory mods is not guaranteed.

There is currently no configuration. Updates to new Minecraft versions will be targeted once the mod is fully developed and bug‑free.

## Warning

This mod is very new and raw; **expect bugs**.

## Requirements

Fabric Loader and Fabric API (client‑side). Works for clients even if the server doesn’t have it installed.
